Notes: The initial zone contains l.campus.edu. only as a helper RRset; the UPDATE first asserts name_absent for l.campus.edu., then attempts delete_rrset of A at that now-absent name. BIND and Knot may diverge on whether this is a harmless no-op or an update semantic error.

Steps.Description: Assert that l.campus.edu. is absent, then delete the A rrset at that name.

Steps.Name: l.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A rrset remains absent and whether the name is still absent.
